title: ALIOTO MINI PARK - 20TH Street And Capp, San Francisco, California
content: I would avoid this park. I don't mind if there's homeless people around but if they terrorize other people, then that's a different story.

title: Parks and Facilities • Alioto Community Garden & Mini Park
content: 42 (and growing!) Community Gardens located across the City where garden volunteers can grow produce and ornamental plants for personal use.

title: Alioto Mini Park - San Francisco, CA - MapQuest
content: Its a cute spot with a community garden, a mini lawn, a wooden non fancy gazebo/stage, good amount of shade and sun and and small playground for the kiddies.
